tools.name: ThinkSLM
tools.description: First extensive benchmark to systematically evaluate reasoning abilities of SLMs. Evaluates 72 diverse SLMs from 6 model families across 17 reasoning benchmarks. Covers quantization, pruning, distillation effects on reasoning.

tools.name: BeyondBench
tools.description: Dynamic evaluation framework generating algorithmic problems to measure genuine reasoning. 44 tasks, 117 variations, 3 difficulty levels. Contamination-resistant by design.

tools.name: CompassVerifier
tools.description: Suite of lightweight verifier models (3B, 7B, 32B) for evaluation and outcome reward. Processes (question, reference, response) triples. Includes VerifierBench with 1.3M+ responses from 50+ models.

tools.name: OpenCompass
tools.description: Comprehensive LLM evaluation platform supporting 100+ datasets. Includes MATHVerifyEvaluator, GenericLLMEvaluator, CascadeEvaluator for complex reasoning pipelines.

tools.name: lm-evaluation-harness
tools.description: Unified framework for few-shot evaluation of language models. Backend for HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard. Supports reasoning tasks including SLR-Bench, BBH, math reasoning.

tools.name: RewardBench
tools.description: Benchmark for evaluating preference reward models across chat, reasoning, and safety. Includes Chat, Chat Hard, Safety, and Reasoning categories.

tools.name: LiveBench
tools.description: Contamination-free LLM benchmark with monthly question updates from recent sources. Covers math, coding, reasoning, language, instruction following, data analysis.

tools.name: HELM (Holistic Evaluation of Language Models)
tools.description: Holistic evaluation framework measuring 7 metrics across 42 scenarios. Includes reasoning evaluation. Efficient-HELM variant for smaller models.

tools.name: DeepEval
tools.description: Open-source LLM evaluation framework with 50+ metrics. Includes reasoning-specific metrics like PlanQualityMetric and G-Eval with CoT.

tools.name: Inspect AI
tools.description: LLM evaluation framework by UK AI Safety Institute. 100+ pre-built evaluations including reasoning benchmarks (BBH, AIME, FrontierScience).

tools.name: BIG-Bench Hard (BBH)
tools.description: 27 challenging tasks requiring algorithmic, logical, linguistic, and commonsense reasoning. Supports zero-shot, few-shot, and chain-of-thought evaluation.

tools.name: SLM-Bench
tools.description: First benchmark specifically for SLMs measuring accuracy, computational efficiency, and sustainability. 15 SLMs, 9 NLP tasks, 23 datasets, 14 domains, 11 metrics.

tools.name: MR-GSM8K
tools.description: Meta-reasoning benchmark evaluating models' ability to verify solution correctness, locate errors, and explain error reasons. Includes code solution and backward reasoning variants.

tools.name: rStar-Math
tools.description: Framework demonstrating SLMs can master math reasoning via MCTS and process reward models. Includes evaluation on MATH and AIME benchmarks.

tools.name: ProcessBench / PRM800K
tools.description: Benchmark and dataset for process reward model evaluation. PRM800K contains 800K step-level human feedback labels. ProcessBench evaluates step-by-step verification.

tools.name: ThinkPRM
tools.description: Long CoT verifier using only 1% of PRM800K labels, outperforming LLM-as-Judge and discriminative verifiers on ProcessBench, MATH-500, AIME.

tools.name: R-PRM (Reasoning-Driven Process Reward Model)
tools.description: Reasoning-driven process reward modeling that improves step-level verification through explicit reasoning chains.

tools.name: tinyBenchmarks
tools.description: Efficient evaluation using 100 curated examples instead of thousands. IRT-based selection. Tiny versions of Open LLM Leaderboard, MMLU, HELM, AlpacaEval.

tools.name: Unitxt
tools.description: Modular Python library for enterprise-grade AI evaluation. 400+ datasets, 200+ prompt templates, 80+ metrics. Integrates with HF, lm-eval-harness.

tools.name: PromptBench
tools.description: Unified evaluation framework for LLMs with adversarial prompt robustness testing. 4 attack types across character, word, sentence, semantic levels.

tools.name: GSM-Plus
tools.description: Comprehensive benchmark for evaluating robustness of LLMs as mathematical problem solvers, extending GSM8K with perturbations.

tools.name: SLM-MUX
tools.description: Orchestration framework for small language models that evaluates discussion-based reasoning methods on SLMs using MATH and GPQA datasets.
